description: The perfect way to complement your ethnic wear is to slip into these beautifully crafted slippers from carlton london. The synthetic V-shaped straps embellished with rhinestones add that extra spark to your personality. Add on a pretty clutch with these sandals and your ethnic or fusion wear, and you're all set to rule the party. Upper Synthetic midfoot straps with a toe separator to lock the foot in place Rhine stone embellishments for added style Padded footbed for all-day comfort and style Outsole Textured durable rubber outsole with a floral groove on the forefoot for absolute grip and traction Slipper care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
